ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "rating" REAL /* Company rating on a scale of 1-5 */,
  "company_txt" TEXT /* Additional text description of the company */,
  "headquarters_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the headquarters of the company */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the company */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ownership_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of company ownership */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the job is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the job is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the job is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code where the job is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "headquarters" (
  "headquarters_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each headquarters */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the headquarters is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the headquarters is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the headquarters is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("headquarters_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the company size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_types" (
  "ownership_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership type */,
  "ownership_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ownership type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ownership type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_skills" (
  "job_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job-skill mapping */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., recruiter, job seeker, admin) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the user */,
  "preferred_skills" TEXT /* Preferred skills of the user (comma-separated) */,
  "preferred_industries" TEXT /* Preferred industries of the user (comma-separated) */,
  "resume_file" TEXT /* File path to the user's resume */,
  "profile_completion_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of the profile completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_saved_jobs" (
  "saved_job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each saved job */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who saved the job */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job saved */,
  "save_date" TEXT /* Date the job was saved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("saved_job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_saved_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_applied_jobs" (
  "applied_job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applied job */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who applied to the job */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job applied */,
  "apply_date" TEXT /* Date the job was applied */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applied_job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_applied_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_industries" (
  "company_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-industry mapping */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_industries_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_industries_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job view */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the job */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the job was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_types" (
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "job_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experience_levels" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience level */,
  "experience_name" TEXT /* Name of the experience level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experience level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)
